creator: @flxrxnutrition
caption:
BOOKMARK THIS POST FOR LATER
-
FREE IIFYM CRASH COURSE IN OUR IG STORY HIGHLIGHT
-
BURGER KING LOW CALORIE MENU ITEMS!!
-
Find yourself in a pinch once or twice a week and need a quick Breakfast, Lunch, or Dinner???
-
Here are some low cal (high protein) Options from @burgerking
-
And before we get a whirlwind of comments from those who are emotionally attached to certain food restrictions, PLEASE REALIZE that this infograph was put together to give people perspective on calories (which matter first and foremost).
-
There are always better choices, maybe not PERFECT choices...but better ones. Consistency over perfection.
-
#musclebuilding #ifitfitsyourmacros #IIFYM
ocr_summary: Burger King low calorie menu items (all without mayo): Grilled Chicken 360cal/36P, Whopper 500cal/28P, Big Fish 340cal/15P, Original Chicken 450cal/28P, Crispy Chicken 460cal/23P, Morning Star Veggie 310cal/21P

parsed.notes: Single image infographic from @iifymacademy (posted by @flxrxnutrition). All 6 items are Burger King sandwiches ordered WITHOUT mayo to reduce calories. The key swap principle is simply removing mayo. Best protein ratio: Grilled Chicken w/o Mayo at 360cal/36g protein (10:1 ratio). Older post (2018) with 591 likes.
